{{Infobox event
| name = Asphodel Incarnation
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel]] [[Incarnation]] is a powerful entity that serves as the physical embodiment of the nature and abilities of its associated [[Territory]]. Functioning much like a fundamental force of physics, this [[Incarnation]] seeks to transform the world into a setting similar to [[Valinhall]]: a place defined by constant combat and harsh, unforgiving conditions where everything must be earned through battle. Unlike standard [[Asphodel Travelers]], who must maintain emotional composure to prevent their [[Territory]] from turning against them, the [[Incarnation]] lacks personal feelings and instead survives by feeding on the emotions of others. This entity possesses the ability to manipulate internal information by nudging it into a tangible form. Visually, the [[Incarnation]] is characterized by clothing made of flowing wood decorated with vines and small flowers, accompanied by a trailing cape of mist. It has been observed using massive, rapidly growing vines to create seating from large blossoms.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] is a target for protection by [[Denner]] and [[Eli]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|When [[Leah]] and her [[Travelers]] first arrived, the [[Asphodel]] [[Incarnation]] was not present. This entity possesses silver hair, lavender eyes, and wears a mist-cape alongside wooden boots decorated with flowers. [[Indirial]] identifies this figure as the worst of all the [[Incarnations]] encountered. The entity is later seen lounging upon a chair made of petals.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] was not present when [[Leah]] and her [[Travelers]] arrived.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] wears boots made of wood decorated with flowers and has a mist-cape.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] is described as the worst of the [[Incarnations]] seen by [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] has silver hair and lavender eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Asphodel Incarnation]] lounges on a chair of petals.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
